lineage.Process: CreateFishnet E:\ArcGIS_files\Projects\030926_inundation_prob\030926_inundation_prob.gdb\cal_fishnet "687768.8693 5636771.6896" "687768.8693 5636781.6896" 500 500 # # "720989.8728 5677687.4409" LABELS "687768.8693 5636771.6896 720989.8728 5677687.4409 PROJCS["NAD_1983_UTM_Zone_11N",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-117.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]]" POLYGON

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>grid_id</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet grid_id !OID! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id dem_zs_cal grid_id MEAN NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DEMMEAN</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet DEMMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>DEMMEAN</field_name></DeleteField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Field</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

CalculateField cal_fishnet DEMMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>DEMMEAN</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id slope_zs_cal grid_id MEAN NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>SLPMEAN</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>MEAN</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id fac_zs_cal grid_id SUM NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>FACSUM</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet FACSUM !SUM! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>SUM</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id imp_zs_cal grid_id PCT NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id dist_hydro_zs_cal grid_id MEAN NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DISTMEAN</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet DISTMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>MEAN</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id imp_zs_cal grid_id PCT NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField cal_fishnet PCT DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id imp_zs_cal grid_id PCT NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField cal_fishnet PCT_1 DELETE_FIELDS
CalculateField cal_fishnet PCT 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id dem_zs_cal AREA AREA NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id dem_zs_cal grid_id AREA NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField cal_fishnet AREA DELETE_FIELDS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DEMAREA</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet DEMAREA !AREA_1! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField cal_fishnet AREA_1 DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id inundation_zs_cal grid_id AREA;MAX NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>INUNAREA</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>INUNMAX</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet INUNAREA !AREA! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField cal_fishnet INUNAREA !MAX! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField cal_fishnet INUNMAX !MAX! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField cal_fishnet AREA DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField cal_fishnet MAX DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField cal_fishnet grid_id inundation_zs_cal grid_id AREA NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField cal_fishnet INUNAREA DELETE_FIELDS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>cal_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>INUNAREA</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField cal_fishnet INUNAREA !AREA! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField cal_fishnet AREA DELETE_FIELDS

ExportTable cal_fishnet "C:\Users\Gab\OneDrive\Documents\SPRING 2026\CPLN6750_Land Use and Environmental Modeling\flood_inundation_probability\Calgary.csv" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,Shape_Area,-1,-1;grid_id "grid_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,grid_id,-1,-1;DEMMEAN "DEMMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,DEMMEAN,-1,-1;SLPMEAN "SLPMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,SLPMEAN,-1,-1;FACSUM "FACSUM" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,FACSUM,-1,-1;DISTMEAN "DISTMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,DISTMEAN,-1,-1;PCT "PCT" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,PCT,-1,-1;DEMAREA "DEMAREA" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,DEMAREA,-1,-1;INUNMAX "INUNMAX" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,INUNMAX,-1,-1;INUNAREA "INUNAREA" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,cal_fishnet,INUNAREA,-1,-1" #

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
